label: Life stage age
description: Associates a LifeStageDef with a minimum biological age and optional sound overrides, defining when a race transitions into that life stage.

def.label: Def
def.description: LifeStageDef that applies once the pawn reaches minAge.

minAge.label: Min age
minAge.description: Minimum biological age in years at which this life stage begins.

soundCall.label: Sound call
soundCall.description: SoundDef played when this animal calls to others at this life stage. Overrides the race-level call sound.

soundAngry.label: Sound angry
soundAngry.description: SoundDef played when this animal becomes aggressive at this life stage.

soundWounded.label: Sound wounded
soundWounded.description: SoundDef played when this animal is injured at this life stage.

soundDeath.label: Sound death
soundDeath.description: SoundDef played when this animal dies at this life stage.

soundAmbience.label: Sound ambience
soundAmbience.description: SoundDef played as an ambient loop for this animal at this life stage.

soundAttack.label: Sound attack
soundAttack.description: SoundDef played when this animal performs a melee attack at this life stage.
